name: pipedream
description: Pipedream Connect integration for workflow automation, managed auth, and 3,000+ app integrations. Run actions, deploy triggers, manage connected accounts, and invoke workflows via the Pipedream API.
author: OrionOmega

setup.description: Configure Pipedream Connect credentials to access 3,000+ app integrations, run actions, and deploy triggers.

methods.label: OAuth Client Credentials (recommended)
methods.description: Use Pipedream OAuth client_id and client_secret for server-to-server API access. Create an OAuth client at pipedream.com/settings/api.

methods.label: User API Key (legacy)
methods.description: Use a personal API key from your Pipedream account. Limited endpoint support.

tools.name: pipedream_apps
tools.description: Search and browse the Pipedream app catalog (3,000+ integrations). List available apps, search by name/category, get app details including auth type and proxy support.

app_id.description: App ID or name_slug (e.g. 'slack', 'google_sheets') for get_app

has_actions.description: Filter to apps with actions only

has_triggers.description: Filter to apps with triggers only

tools.name: pipedream_components
tools.description: List and retrieve Pipedream component definitions (actions and triggers). Search components by app or keyword, get full prop schemas for configuration.

app.description: Filter by app slug (e.g. 'slack') for list_components

external_user_id.description: External user ID (for configure_prop and reload_props)

configured_props.description: Currently configured props (for configure_prop and reload_props)

tools.name: pipedream_actions
tools.description: List, configure, and run Pipedream action components. Execute any of 10,000+ pre-built API operations (send Slack messages, create Jira issues, add Google Sheets rows, etc.) on behalf of connected users.

external_user_id.description: External user ID that owns the connected account

configured_props.description: Configured props including auth provision (e.g. { slack: { authProvisionId: 'apn_xxx' }, channel: 'C123' })

dynamic_props_id.description: Dynamic props ID from reload_props (dyp_xxx) — required if component uses dynamic props

version.description: Component version (semver, e.g. '0.0.3') — defaults to latest

app.description: Filter by app slug for list_actions

tools.name: pipedream_triggers
tools.description: Deploy, list, update, and delete Pipedream trigger components (event sources). Deploy triggers to listen for events from third-party apps (new Slack messages, GitHub PRs, etc.) and forward them to webhooks or workflows.

external_user_id.description: External user ID that owns the connected account

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL to receive trigger events

workflow_id.description: Workflow ID (p_xxx) to receive trigger events

emit_on_deploy.description: Emit historical events on deploy (default true)

tools.name: pipedream_accounts
tools.description: Manage Pipedream connected accounts (OAuth and API key connections for end users). List accounts, get account details with credentials, and delete accounts.

external_user_id.description: Filter accounts by external user ID

app.description: Filter by app slug (e.g. 'slack', 'github') — also used for delete_accounts_by_app

include_credentials.description: Include OAuth tokens/API keys in response (requires own OAuth client)

tools.name: pipedream_users
tools.description: Manage Pipedream Connect external users and tokens. List external users, delete users (and all their accounts/triggers), and create Connect tokens for frontend auth flows.

external_user_id.description: External user ID (your app's user identifier)

token_expires_in.description: Connect token TTL in seconds (1-14400, default 14400 = 4 hours)

webhook_uri.description: Webhook URI for connection event notifications

success_redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI after successful account connection

tools.name: pipedream_workflows
tools.description: Invoke Pipedream workflows via HTTP trigger. Trigger multi-step workflows passing user identity and custom data.

workflow_id.description: Workflow ID (p_xxx) — alternative to workflow_url for invoking via Connect

external_user_id.description: External user ID for user-scoped workflow execution

payload.description: JSON payload to send to the workflow

tools.name: pipedream_proxy
tools.description: Route custom API requests through Pipedream's Connect Proxy with automatic credential injection. Send requests to any of 3,000+ third-party APIs using managed auth — no raw tokens needed.

account_id.description: Account ID (apn_xxx) to use for auth injection

url.description: Target API URL path or full URL (e.g. '/api/chat.postMessage' or 'https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage')

auth_method.label: Authentication Method
auth_method.description: How to authenticate with the Pipedream API. OAuth Client Credentials is recommended for full API access. User API Key is simpler but has limited endpoint support.

_oauth_instructions.label: OAuth Setup Instructions
_oauth_instructions.description:
To configure OAuth Client Credentials:

1. Go to https://pipedream.com/settings/api in your workspace
2. Click 'New OAuth Client' and name it (e.g. 'OrionOmega')
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately — the secret is only shown once
4. Enter them in the fields below
5. Enter your Project ID from Project Settings

The skill will automatically exchange these for short-lived bearer tokens (1-hour TTL) and refresh them as needed.

oauth_client_id.label: OAuth Client ID
oauth_client_id.description: Pipedream OAuth client ID from pipedream.com/settings/api.

oauth_client_secret.label: OAuth Client Secret
oauth_client_secret.description: Pipedream OAuth client secret. Only shown once when created.

_api_key_instructions.label: API Key Setup Instructions
_api_key_instructions.description:
To configure API Key authentication:

1. Go to https://pipedream.com/settings/account
2. Copy your API Key from 'My Account'
3. Paste it below

Note: User API Keys have limited endpoint support compared to OAuth.

oauth_access_token.label: OAuth Access Token (auto-managed)
oauth_access_token.description: Current OAuth bearer token. Automatically obtained and refreshed by the skill — do not edit manually unless troubleshooting.

oauth_token_expires_at.label: Token Expiry (auto-managed)
oauth_token_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current access token expires.

project_id.label: Project ID
project_id.description: Pipedream project ID (proj_xxx). Find this in Project Settings on pipedream.com. Required for all Connect API calls.

environment.label: Environment
environment.description: Pipedream environment. Development is free (max 10 users). Production requires a paid plan.

default_external_user_id.label: Default External User ID
default_external_user_id.description: Default external user ID to use when none is specified in tool calls. This maps to your app's user identifier.

_features_header.label: ── Feature Enablement ──
_features_header.description: Toggle major feature areas on/off. Disabled features won't load their tools.

enable_apps.label: Enable App Catalog
enable_apps.description: Enable app search and discovery tools.

enable_components.label: Enable Components
enable_components.description: Enable component listing and retrieval tools.

enable_actions.label: Enable Actions
enable_actions.description: Enable action listing, configuration, and execution tools.

enable_triggers.label: Enable Triggers
enable_triggers.description: Enable trigger deployment and management tools.

enable_accounts.label: Enable Account Management
enable_accounts.description: Enable connected account listing and management tools.

enable_users.label: Enable User Management
enable_users.description: Enable external user and token management tools.

enable_proxy.label: Enable Connect Proxy
enable_proxy.description: Enable API proxy tools for routing requests through Pipedream with managed credentials.

max_results.label: Default Max Results
max_results.description: Default maximum results for list/search operations (1-100).

api_base_url.label: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: Pipedream API base URL. Only change for custom deployments or proxies.
